Claressa Shields won a lopsided unanimous decision over Franchon Crews-Dezurn to successfully defend her undisputed heavyweight championship at Little Caesars Arena on Sunday night. Crews-Dezurn, who holds a super-middleweight title, fell to 10-3. “I had to take my time tonight,” Shields said.

title: Lakers Unveil Pat Riley Statue Outside Crypto.com Arena
snippets: Legendary Lakers coach Pat Riley was honored with a statue outside Crypto.com Arena on Sunday.
Riley led the 'Showtime Lakers' to four NBA titles as coach during the 1980s

LOS ANGELES — The Los Angeles Lakers have unveiled a statue of Pat Riley outside their downtown arena to honour the head coach who masterminded their Showtime championship era. Riley was in attendance Sunday when the Lakers revealed the 8-foot bronze likeness of the Hall of Fame coach in one of his famed Giorgio Armani suits. The statue stands in Star Plaza between statues of Kareem Abdul-Jabbar and Magic Johnson, the two pillars of the Lakers’ five championships in the 1980s. Riley was an assistant for that first title before leading the Lakers to the next four, reaching seven NBA Finals in...
"Showtime"-era Lakers royalty including Magic Johnson, Kareem Abdul-Jabbar and James Worthy showed up Sunday for Riley's statue ceremony.

Riley attended the ceremony, joined by former Lakers players including Magic Johnson, Kareem Abdul-Jabbar, and James Worthy.
